extortion.description: RM Medics is a medical recruitment agency specializing in placing healthcare professionals, particularly locum doctors, in NHS hospitals throughout the UK. The company prides itself on its exceptional recruitment consultants and a commitment to providing quality assurance and compliance with NHS standards. With over 30 years of experience, RM Medics offers an out-of-hours service, ensuring quick and efficient solutions for hospitals in urgent need. Their client base primarily includes NHS hospitals requiring both temporary and permanent locum placements.
